svg.title: LithePG package verifier nested symlink gate
svg.desc: Evidence summary for the v1.0 package verification hardening slice that rejects any symlink nested inside LithePG.app.
svg.text: Target: no symlink entries anywhere under LithePG.app before release packaging

g.text: failed first: resource symlink and unreadable-tree regressions accepted verification
package_verify, create_release_zip, sign_and_notarize, v10_release_gate tests → passed
swift build + build_and_run.sh --package → passed (11.93 MiB packaged exe)
/usr/bin/find detects nested bundle symlinks and fails closed on traversal errors
Failure output: package verification failed: app bundle must not contain symlinks
No signing, notarization, upload, Homebrew publication, tag, or cron changes.

svg.text: Artifact: docs/evidence/2026-06-01-package-verify-nested-symlink-gate.svg — no secrets, seeded/local evidence only.
